output:
Aggregated execute batches: completed 4/5.
Batch 1: Implemented batch 1 task T1 in `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts` by adding a top-level triage section, introducing `// MESSAGE` to effect-mode output rules, and changing the user prompt to neutral `User request for...` framing. Also wrote the batch checkpoint to `.megaplan/plans/add-agent-response-messages-20260401-0221/execution_batch_1.json`.
Batch 2: Implemented batch 2 task T2 in `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/templates.ts` by adding `QUESTION_RESPONSE` and `MESSAGE` extraction support, threading `message` through extracted effect metadata, and preserving the existing validation flow for code responses. Batch progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/add-agent-response-messages-20260401-0221/execution_batch_2.json`.
Batch 3: Implemented batch 3 task T3 in `supabase/functions/ai-generate-effect/index.ts` by short-circuiting `QUESTION_RESPONSE` outputs before extraction/retry and by including `message` on successful code responses. Batch progress was checkpointed to `.megaplan/plans/add-agent-response-messages-20260401-0221/execution_batch_3.json`.
Batch 4: Batch 4 completed T5 and attempted T4. `src/tools/video-editor/components/EffectCreatorPanel.tsx` now handles question-only responses and shows a dismissible inline agent message box. The edge-function deploy is still blocked in this environment.

task_updates.executor_notes: Restructured `buildGenerateEffectMessages()` so the system prompt now opens with a top-level TRIAGE block that separates QUESTION MODE from EFFECT MODE, includes examples, and places `EFFECT_COMPONENT_CONTRACT`, `AVAILABLE_GLOBALS`, `OUTPUT_RULES`, and `VALIDATION_RULES` under an `EFFECT MODE rules` header. Added `// MESSAGE: <brief note>` immediately after the `// PARAMS` rule, changed the non-retry user prompt to `User request for a ${category} effect...`, and updated the closing instruction so QUESTION MODE is allowed to return a conversational response while retry/fix mode remains code-generation oriented. Verified by inspecting the final prompt text and diff in `templates.ts`.

Added independent `QUESTION_RESPONSE_MARKER` and `MESSAGE_PATTERN` regexes, a standalone exported `extractQuestionResponse()` helper that strips markdown fences and returns everything after the marker line as `{ isQuestion: true, message }`, and an internal `extractMessage()` helper for single-line `// MESSAGE:` metadata. Updated `ExtractedEffectMeta` to include `message`, and updated `extractEffectCodeAndMeta()` to strip the message line from generated code while still calling `validateExtractedEffectCode()` unconditionally. Verified with a local Node + `typescript.transpileModule` smoke test that question responses parse independently, `message` is preserved while removed from `code`, and malformed code containing `// MESSAGE:` still throws the normal validation error.

Imported `extractQuestionResponse` into `index.ts`, then inserted a question-response gate immediately after the raw-output log and before the `extractEffectCodeAndMeta()` try/catch. When the marker is present, the edge function now logs the branch, flushes, and returns `jsonResponse({ message, isQuestionResponse: true, model })` without entering extraction or retry. The normal success path now includes `message: extracted.message || undefined`. Verified by inspecting the relevant lines and with a local Node + `typescript.transpileModule` source check confirming the question branch appears before the extraction try block and the file transpiles without diagnostics.

Attempted the requested deploy with `npx supabase functions deploy ai-generate-effect --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc`, but `npx` could not reach `registry.npmjs.org` in this environment. Confirmed a system `supabase` binary exists at `/opt/homebrew/bin/supabase` and retried with that binary directly; it failed immediately with `Access token not provided`, so the edge function was not deployed and I could not verify remote inclusion of the `templates.ts` and `index.ts` changes.
commands_run: npx supabase functions deploy ai-generate-effect --project-ref wczysqzxlwdndgxitrvc

task_updates.executor_notes: Updated `GenerateEffectResponse` so `code` is optional and the response can carry `message` plus `isQuestionResponse`. Added `agentMessage` state, clear-on-reset/new-generation behavior, and a dismissible inline message box. In `handleGenerate()`, question-only responses now set the message, clear the prompt, and return before mutating generated code, name, schema, or compile path; normal responses set the message and then continue the existing code-update flow with an explicit `response.code` guard. Verified by inspecting the `handleGenerate()` block, confirming dismiss/reset hooks in source, and running a local TypeScript `transpileModule` parse check with zero diagnostics.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed the system prompt now starts with an explicit TRIAGE section that distinguishes QUESTION MODE from EFFECT MODE before any output rules, and the user prompt now uses neutral `User request for a ${category} effect...` framing.

Confirmed `extractQuestionResponse()` and `extractMessage()` are separate helpers, and verified behaviorally that `extractEffectCodeAndMeta()` still routes `// MESSAGE:` responses through `validateExtractedEffectCode()` by throwing the expected validation error on malformed code.

Confirmed the `extractQuestionResponse()` check is placed before the `extractEffectCodeAndMeta()` try/catch, and the `jsonResponse({ message, isQuestionResponse: true, model })` return is on that branch so question-only responses exit before extraction or retry.

No. The edge-function deploy did not succeed in this environment: the requested `npx` invocation failed on npm registry DNS resolution, and a retry with the installed `supabase` CLI failed due a missing `SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN`/login. Because deployment did not complete, I could not verify the remote project includes the latest `templates.ts` and `index.ts` changes.

Confirmed in `handleGenerate()` that the `isQuestionResponse` branch sets `agentMessage`, clears `prompt`, and returns before any `setCode`, `setParameterSchema`, name update, or compile call. Also confirmed `agentMessage` is cleared on new generation, inside `resetForm()`, and via the inline dismiss button.
